title: Dabangg
subTitle: Chulbul Pandey, a police officer, battles a corrupt political leader, Cheddi Singh, who strains Chulbul's relationship with his step-brother.

title: Kotigobba 3
subTitle: After succeeding at framing ACP Kishore, Satya goes on to become an international criminal. While he gets targeted by Interpol, Kishore seeks revenge on him too, upon being released from prison.

title: Runway 34
subTitle: Upon dealing with the rough climate in Cochin, two pilots make a risky landing in Thiruvananthapuram. But trouble ensues when personnel from the AAIB probes the matter.

title: Mafia
subTitle: A narcotics officer engages in a cat-and-mouse chase to capture a powerful criminal kingpin, not knowing that it could have a connection to a truth in his past.

title: Cycle Kick
subTitle: The lives of two brothers change when they find an abandoned bicycle. However, their happiness is short-lived when the two-wheeler is stolen from them.

title: Thank God
subTitle: An egotistical real estate broker comes face-to-face with God after meeting with an accident. Soon, he is forced to play a game that will put him either in heaven or hell.

title: Koi ... Mil Gaya
subTitle: A young man with special needs is influenced by his father's scientific work. He encounters an alien who grants him extraordinary abilities and transforms his life.

title: Ek Deewane Ki Deewaniyat
subTitle: An influential politician and a headstrong megastar's fiery romance fuelled with passion brings absolute chaos, mania and melancholy.

title: RRR
subTitle: A fearless revolutionary and an officer in the British force, who once shared a deep bond, decide to join forces and chart out an inspirational path of freedom against the despotic rulers.

title: Zee Cine Awards 2026 E Lounge Purple Carpet
subTitle: Zee Cine Awards 2026 E Lounge Purple Carpet

title: Zee Cine Awards 2026
subTitle: An awards night to honor the best talent from Indian film industry for their contribution to Indian cinema, and recognizing notable performers of 2013.

title: Zee Cine Awards 2026
subTitle: An awards night to honor the best talent from Indian film industry for their contribution to Indian cinema, and recognizing notable performers of 2013.

title: Dabangg 3
subTitle: Chulbul Pandey, a corrupt police officer, leads a happy life with his wife and family. However, when his past enemy returns to wreak havoc, he must protect his loved ones from harm.

title: Time Story
subTitle: Sethuraman, a scientist, invents a time-travelling gadget that his evil twin Athreya wants to get hold of. Soon, a bitter battle arises between Sethuraman's son and Athreya.

title: Khel A Team to Play
subTitle: Two rival brothers face off against each other as coaches from opposite teams to win the annual village football tournament.

title: Auron Mein Kahan Dum Tha
subTitle: As Krishna, an incarcerated man, faces early release, his love story with Vasudha from more than twenty years ago unfurls.

title: Rowdy Rakshak
subTitle: Kathiravan is assigned to protect Prime Minister Chandrakanth Varma from terrorists. However, he is unsuccessful and takes it upon himself to find the killers.

title: Andaaz
subTitle: After his sweetheart Kajal marries another man, Raj moves to Cape Town. He eventually agrees to marry Jiya but is shocked to find that she is Kajal's widowed sister-in-law.

title: Vivah
subTitle: Poonam, a traditional young woman, gets engaged to Prem, a wealthy man. Their faith and love are tested when an accident occurs and leaves Poonam with first degree burns.

title: Saamy 2
subTitle: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: Raid 2
subTitle: An honest Income Tax officer, Amay Patnaik, confronts the corrupt nexus in Bhoj. Beneath the veneer of honesty lies a sinister operation tied to Dada Bhai, a revered politician.

title: Antim: The Final Truth
subTitle: Rahul runs away from his poverty-stricken village life to become a gangster in the city. There, he locks horns with an upstanding policeman who tries to set him on the right path.

title: Antim: The Final Truth
subTitle: Rahul runs away from his poverty-stricken village life to become a gangster in the city. There, he locks horns with an upstanding policeman who tries to set him on the right path.

title: Action Rowdy
subTitle: Anna rules over Rayalaseema with a good heart. However, when a project threatens the well-being of his people, he does everything he can to oppose it and angers dangerous people as a result.

title: Zero
subTitle: A vertically-challenged bachelor with a larger-than-life personality discovers his life's purpose through his relationships with two wildly different women.

title: Rog
subTitle: A troubled police officer falls in love with a dead woman while investigating her murder. Soon, he gets trapped in a situation that leads to further conflicts.

title: Bro
subTitle: An arrogant young man meets his end in a fatal car accident and meets the god of time. While the god grants him three months to set his life in order, the man realises the error of his previous ways.

title: Jai Simha
subTitle: Narasimha, a fiery but kind-hearted mechanic, becomes the guardian of an innocent family. Subsequently, he ends up taking on the ruthless kingpin Kariappan and his violent gang to protect them.

title: Kick
subTitle: Devi, a man who cannot stay put as he is addicted to going on new adventures, breaks up with his girlfriend, Shaina, who is a Warsaw-based psychiatrist, just to pursue his daredevil ambitions.

title: Baby John
subTitle: An indomitable policeman goes to greater lengths and leads a double life in order to protect his daughter from the criminal underworld.

title: Mission Raniganj
subTitle: Mission Raniganj - 2023 - Mining engineer Jaswant Singh Gill leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.

title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
subTitle: Pawan Chaturvedi rises above the divisive bounds of nationality and religion to help a little Pakistani girl stranded in India.

title: Khiladi
subTitle: Pooja, a criminologist, along with Arjun, a CBI official, tries to solve two interlinked cases of murder and money laundering. As they investigate the crimes, the conspiracy intensifies.
